title: go-testgen test specification
description: Describes test cases for a Go function in domain terms, without writing code. go-testgen gen-cases materializes this into _test.go entries.

name.description: Go identifier for the fixture variable.

description.description: What this fixture represents; emitted as a comment.

value.description: Go literal. Omit to generate a TODO placeholder.

clear_between_cases.description: If true, gen-cases emits a clear call at the top of each test case.

id.description: Identifier used in checks[*].for_type and referenced in cases.

composer.description: Name of the composer var, e.g. 'checkEngine'.

package.description: Import path if defined in another package. Omit if same package.

sentinel_empty.description: Documents the special meaning of an empty/zero value, e.g. 'empty string means no error expected'.

id.description: Function name as written in Go.

for_type.description: id of the check_type this check belongs to.

scope.description: global: package/cross-package scope. local: defined inside the TestXxx function body.

signature.description: Full Go signature including return type.

when.description: When to use this check — its invariant in prose.

captures.description: Names of outer-scope variables this closure captures (e.g. buf, logger).

role.description: input: passed to the function or constructor. gate: controls conditional logic in the test body (wantPanic, wantLog). state: used by before/after for setup/teardown.

description.description: Natural language description of what before does. The AI generates Go code from this.

mechanism.description: Dominant setup pattern. Guides the AI to the correct Go idiom.

type.description: Go return type of the before function.

used_as.description: How the returned value is used in the test body or checks.

name.description: Test case name passed to t.Run().

fields.description: Values for table_fields entries. Keys must match table_fields[*].name. Values are Go expression strings.

gates.description: Values for gate-role table_fields (wantLog, wantPanic, wantValue, wantErr).

checks.description: Check call expressions in Go syntax, e.g. 'CheckResultError("not ok")'.

todo.description: If true, generate this case as a TODO comment placeholder.

test_file.description: Optional override for the target _test.go file path.

context.description: How the test body is structured. Gives the AI the frame before generating case code.

subject_init.description: Go expression or description for how the subject is constructed per case.

shared_setup.description: Code/description for infrastructure declared outside the test table (loggers, buffers, timers).

fixtures.description: Shared data variables declared once, referenced by name in before descriptions.

check_types.description: Check function types used in this test. There may be more than one.

checks.description: Catalog of available check functions. The AI uses this to choose and call checks correctly.

table_fields.description: Extra fields in the test struct beyond name/checks/before/after.
